first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning in the justification and strengths sections remains consistent across both evaluations. While the secondary and tertiary concerns shifted between the two runs (from on-call/strategy to stakeholder management/job recency), these new concerns are plausible interpretations of the resume and are not linked to the candidate's location changing from Germany to Romania. The differences fall within the scope of normal run-to-run variation.
